subject_information.address: 230 Tiffany Mountain Suite 863, South Michael, KY 25205

suspicious_activity.narrative: Michael Stanley (CUST_0062), a medium-risk customer, exhibited suspicious activity indicative of money laundering. Notably, on 2025-07-27, an incoming wire transfer of $98,090.16 was credited to his account. Subsequently, four large outgoing wire transfers totaling $71,181.08 were made from 2025-07-28 to 2025-07-29. These transactions, coupled with a high volume of diverse transactions throughout the year, raise suspicion of money laundering.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Step 1: Reviewed customer profile, account details, and transaction history. Step 2: Noticed unusual volume of transactions and high-risk methods (wire transfers). Step 3: Mapped patterns to BSA/AML regulations. Step 4: Assessed risk as High due to large transaction amounts and frequency. Step 5: Classified as Money Laundering due to patterns observed.
